policyMetadata.noncomplianceMessage: DRCP control 'drcp-aks-02 - Ensure that network endpoints are private'. For remediation, see https://confluence.office01.internalcorp.net:8453/display/DRCPKB/Incident+remediation+Kubernetes+Service#IncidentremediationKubernetesService-drcp-aks-02 .

policyDefinition.displayName: APG DRCP AKS Private cluster enabled
policyDefinition.description: Enable the private cluster feature for your Azure Kubernetes Service cluster to ensure network traffic between your API server and your node pools remains on the private network only. This is a common requirement in many regulatory and industry compliance standards.

drcp.name: AKSEnablePrivateCluster
drcp.controlDesc: Ensure that network endpoints are private

metadata.description: Effect of this Azure Policy - Audit, Deny or Disabled.
